fields.label: Template Code
fields.description: Unique sector identifier (e.g., fashion, industrial, food, electronics, health_beauty, automotive, custom)

fields.label: Version
fields.description: Template version (e.g., 1.0, 2.0). Unique together with template_code.

fields.label: Active Version
fields.description: Only one version per template_code should be active at a time. Active version is used for new onboardings.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Brief description of the industry template and its target audience

fields.label: Est. Setup Time (minutes)
fields.description: Estimated time in minutes for a user to complete onboarding with this template

fields.label: Default Quality Threshold
fields.description: Default product quality score threshold for this industry (0-100)

fields.label: Attribute Groups Data
fields.description: JSON array of attribute group definitions with their attributes for this industry

fields.label: Product Families Data
fields.description: JSON array of product family definitions and hierarchy for this industry

fields.label: Default Channels
fields.description: JSON array of default sales channels for this industry (e.g., Shopify, Amazon, Trendyol)

fields.label: Coming Soon Channels
fields.description: JSON array of channels that are planned but not yet available

fields.label: Compliance Modules
fields.description: JSON array of compliance/regulatory modules relevant to this industry

fields.label: Scoring Weights
fields.description: JSON object defining quality scoring weight distribution for this industry

fields.label: Category Tree Structure
fields.description: JSON tree structure defining the default category hierarchy for this industry

fields.label: Default Languages
fields.description: JSON array of default languages for this industry (e.g., ["en", "tr"])

fields.label: Demo Product Definitions
fields.description: JSON array of sample product definitions used during onboarding preview and first data entry
